assignments.kpiStatement: Maintain facility uptime above 98%, complete preventive maintenance fully, and avoid major operational disruptions.
Keep utility and maintenance expenditure within approved budget.
Maintain required safety and compliance standards across facilities.
Keep asset register accuracy at 100% and maintain zero company asset losses.

Low-stock and KVI availability issues are escalated promptly and documented properly

Technical decisions documented and high-risk changes controlled
Priority business workflows digitized and governed
Timely and useful technology reporting to leadership
Delivery of approved IT roadmap milestones

Minimum control environment implemented for live systems
Post-go-live stabilization effectiveness
Grow combined daily order volume toward approved targets and reverse recent order decline through repeatable commercial execution.
Scale same-day delivery order throughput while protecting fulfilment quality and execution consistency.
Run the approved free-delivery promotional cadence consistently and on schedule.
Convert promotional campaigns into measurable revenue uplift against approved promo targets.
Increase the Nivea monthly revenue line against target through focused commercial actions.
Improve Beesline monthly unit movement through strong in-store merchandising and sell-through execution.
Launch and stabilise new revenue lines using the brand introduction playbook.
Deliver all-channel daily department revenue against target and keep the team focused on the highest-yield levers.
Grow the largest channel revenue line against daily target and sustain momentum in the strongest commercial lane.
Maintain average order value at or above the agreed floor through bundling and cross-sell discipline.
Maintain on-time same-day delivery performance at the agreed service level.
Reduce stockout incidents across top SKUs through forecasting follow-up and replenishment coordination.
Drive direct reports to achieve department KPIs through clear cascade, follow-up, and performance management.
Maintain target retention across key wholesale partners through joint planning and disciplined relationship management.
Develop budgets, forecasts, and financial models, and provide decision-ready analysis to management.
Manage budget preparation, monitor variances, and drive efficient allocation of financial resources.
Oversee inventory valuation, cost analysis, gross margin analysis, pricing strategy, and profitability by product or channel.
Prepare timely and accurate management accounts, financial statements, variance reports, and maintain audit-ready records.
Monitor cash flow, liquidity, working capital, and banking relationships to optimise treasury performance.
Ensure compliance with statutory obligations and strengthen internal controls and risk management processes.
Oversee finance controls around inventory, reconcile POS/inventory/finance systems, and improve ERP-driven processes.
Lead and develop the finance team through coaching, performance objectives, and capability building.
Partner with leadership on strategic initiatives and support data-driven business decisions across departments.
